title: Samsung's Z Fold 8 Phones Pack the Biggest Battery Upgrade in Years
summary: The batteries inside the Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8, Z Fold 8, and Z Fold 8 Ultra all benefit from the energy-storage equation. A longer lifecycle is another major benefit of silicon-carbon batteries.
